_notes.greenhouse: Companies using Greenhouse ATS — board token is the URL slug (boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/{token}). No API key needed.
_notes.lever: Companies using Lever ATS — slug is the company identifier (api.lever.co/v0/postings/{slug}). No API key needed.
_notes.general: All other companies — searched via JSearch/Adzuna with company name filters.
_notes.how_to_add: To add a company, first check if they use Greenhouse (boards.greenhouse.io/{name}) or Lever (jobs.lever.co/{name}). If yes, add to the right section. Otherwise add to 'general'.

_how_to_verify_ats.greenhouse: Visit https://boards.greenhouse.io/{company_name} — if the page loads with jobs, it's a valid token
_how_to_verify_ats.lever: Visit https://jobs.lever.co/{company_slug} — if jobs show up, the slug is correct
